# Image Analysis

**Summary**: A method used to process images (such as CT scans or thin sections) to quantify and characterize geological features.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-saraih|Saraih, 2024]] applied image analysis to calculate burrow percentages in BIFM 1, 2, and 3.

- Image analysis of unit 2B showed a burrow percentage ranging from 10% to 30%. ([[2024-saraih|Saraih, 2024, p. 54]])
